description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: In this context, the element "trigger" means that the Core Facilitator is responsible for requesting the addition of Atlas Core Development payments to an Executive Vote. The Core Facilitator is also responsible for providing provenance for such requests by confirming payment requests on the Executive Sheet. See [A.1.10.1.3.0.3.1 - Executive Sheet - Element Annotation](52aef6ac-9eda-4795-9dab-73ea85b8ca31).
description: Delete `A.1.4.5.1 - Exception for ADs Contributing To Atlas Core Development`. Delete `A.1.5.3.5.2 - Atlas Workstreams`. Delete `A.2.2 - Atlas Core Development` and its subdocuments and supporting documents.
